topic: Percentage of consumers who search online before visiting a local business

script.hook: 97% of people search online before visiting a local business.
beats: That number comes from Google itself. Nearly every customer checks the internet before they ever walk through your door.
If your business isn't showing up online, those customers are finding your competitor instead. It really is that simple.
A real website built for local search puts you in front of High Desert customers who are already looking for what you sell.
script.cta: DM us SITE and let's get you found.
